title: Win11Forge Rollback Settings
description: Schema for the Win11Forge rollback system configuration governing automatic rollback behavior and failure reporting

autoRollbackEnabled.description: Whether automatic rollback is triggered after consecutive failures

autoRollbackThreshold.description: Number of consecutive failures before automatic rollback is triggered

requireConfirmation.description: Whether user confirmation is required before executing a rollback

confirmationTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for rollback confirmation prompts before auto-proceeding

criticalFailurePatterns.description: Regex patterns that identify critical system failures requiring immediate rollback

rollbackMethods.description: Classification of installation methods by rollback support

supported.description: Installation methods that support automatic rollback (uninstall)

unsupported.description: Installation methods that do not support automatic rollback

autoExportOnFailure.description: Automatically export a failure report when rollback occurs

reportDirectory.description: Directory path for rollback failure reports (supports environment variable expansion)

defaultFormat.description: Default export format for rollback reports
